en: And the LORD said to Job:
zh: 耶和華又對約伯說：

en: "Shall a faultfinder contend with the Almighty? He who argues with God, let him answer it."
zh: “挑剔是非的，怎能與全能者爭辯呢？ 責備 神的，回答這個問題吧。”

en: Then Job answered the LORD and said:
zh: 於是約伯回答耶和華說：

en: "Behold, I am of small account; what shall I answer you? I lay my hand on my mouth.
zh: “我是微小的，可以回答你甚麼呢？ 我只好用手掩口。

en: I have spoken once, and I will not answer; twice, but I will proceed no further."
zh: 這說了一次，不再回答； 說了二次就不再說。”

en: Then the LORD answered Job out of the whirlwind and said:
zh: 於是耶和華從旋風中回答約伯說：

en: "Dress for action like a man; I will question you, and you make it known to me.
zh: “你要如勇士束腰， 我要問你，你要告訴我。

en: Will you even put me in the wrong? Will you condemn me that you may be in the right?
zh: 你怎能廢棄我所審斷的？ 怎能定我為有罪，好顯出你自己為義呢？

en: Have you an arm like God, and can you thunder with a voice like his?
zh: 你有 神那樣的膀臂嗎？ 你能用他那樣的聲音打雷嗎？

en: "Adorn yourself with majesty and dignity; clothe yourself with glory and splendor.
zh: 你當以莊嚴與尊貴為裝飾， 以尊榮與威嚴為衣服。

en: Pour out the overflowings of your anger, and look on everyone who is proud and abase him.
zh: 要倒盡你忿激的怒氣， 觀看所有驕傲的人，使他們降卑。

en: Look on everyone who is proud and bring him low and tread down the wicked where they stand.
zh: 觀看所有驕傲的人，把他制伏， 把惡人踐踏在他們的地方，

en: Hide them all in the dust together; bind their faces in the world below.
zh: 把他們一起掩藏在塵土裡， 把他們本人捆綁在隱密處。

en: Then will I also acknowledge to you that your own right hand can save you.
zh: 這樣，我就要向你承認， 你的右手能拯救你。

en: "Behold, Behemoth, which I made as I made you; he eats grass like an ox.
zh: 你看看河馬吧， 我造牠像造你一樣， 牠吃草如牛一般。

en: Behold, his strength in his loins, and his power in the muscles of his belly.
zh: 你看，牠的力量在腰間， 牠的能力在肚腹的肌肉上，

en: He makes his tail stiff like a cedar; the sinews of his thighs are knit together.
zh: 牠挺直尾巴硬如香柏樹， 牠大腿的筋虬結在一起，

en: His bones are tubes of bronze, his limbs like bars of iron.
zh: 牠的骨頭仿佛銅管， 牠的骨幹好像鐵棍。

en: "He is the first of the works of God; let him who made him bring near his sword!
zh: 牠在 神所造的事工中居首 ， 只有創造牠的能使刀劍臨到牠身上。

en: For the mountains yield food for him where all the wild beasts play.
zh: 群山為牠生出食物， 田野的百獸都在那裡玩耍。

en: Under the lotus plants he lies, in the shelter of the reeds and in the marsh.
zh: 牠躺在蓮葉之下， 躺在蘆葦叢中與泥澤之間；

en: For his shade the lotus trees cover him; the willows of the brook surround him.
zh: 蓮葉的陰影遮蔽牠， 溪旁的白楊樹環繞牠。

en: Behold, if the river is turbulent he is not frightened; he is confident though Jordan rushes against his mouth.
zh: 江河氾濫，牠毫不慌張， 約旦河的水漲到牠的口邊，牠還是安然。

en: Can one take him by his eyes, or pierce his nose with a snare?
zh: 牠警覺的時候誰能捉拿牠？ 誰能用鐵圈穿牠的鼻子呢？”
